cells.rationale: Backstop hardening of a security control (escalation-guard exec/ref-mutation deny paths) is a hard opus gate on a subtle security invariant, and closing all exec-bearing git-config vectors without regressing write-capable roles is contract-shaped adversarial reasoning warranting xhigh.
